kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09C. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09C" and put them into a temporary table called J09C_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are three additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, and houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

Export the final result as a CSV file named "J09C" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

Send the CSV to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp; CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'; ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
CREATE TEMP TABLE IF NOT EXISTS J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

args.sql_query: SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg ON j.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
